title: brickellia oblongifolia
intro: Brickellia oblongifolia, also known as False Dragonhead, is a flowering plant native to North America, particularly in the southwestern regions of the United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's extracts have been used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. Brickellia oblongifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
